raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1411 was designed to strengthen the alignment between K-12 and college STEM education.",
    "SB 1411 aimed to facilitate the participation of subject matter experts from colleges and universities in mathematics and science K-12 curriculum development discussions.",
    "SB 1411 was viewed as a crucial step towards creating a cohesive and comprehensive STEM education.",
    "The inability to improve math performance in the U.S. is perceived as a threat to national economic competitiveness and security.",
    "The Defense Department has called for a major initiative to support education in science, technology, engineering, and math.",
    "There are purportedly eight times as many college graduates in STEM disciplines in China compared to the United States.",
    "The decision to veto Senate Bill 1411 is expected to hinder the alignment of math and science curricular frameworks with future workforce skills.",
    "Higher education involvement in K-12 curriculum development has been advocated by over 1,000 domain experts, including Nobel Prize and Turing Award winners."
  ]
```
